data.body: Additional finding: On re-run, the script fails entirely with 'line 71: File: unbound variable'. The root cause is stat -f %m (macOS syntax) on Linux — stat -f on Linux means 'filesystem mode' and interprets %m as a filename argument rather than a format specifier. With set -u (nounset), the arithmetic evaluation of the unexpected stat output causes an unbound variable error. The script ran successfully the first time in this session (likely using a cached sync marker from a prior session), but fails on subsequent runs when the marker file state changes.
